name: papyrus
description: A Pretext-powered responsive newspaper layout lab.

scripts.test:assignments: poetry run papyrus analysis test category-mappers
scripts.test:categories: poetry run papyrus analysis test category-mappers
scripts.test:doi-backfill: poetry run papyrus analysis test doi-backfill
scripts.test:identifier-backfill: poetry run papyrus analysis test identifier-backfill
scripts.check:backend-node-policy: poetry run papyrus procedures policy check-backend-node-scripts
scripts.check:reference-action-contract: poetry run papyrus procedures policy check-reference-action-contract
scripts.test:bdd:agent-live: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@live-agent
scripts.test:bdd:agent-live:core: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-core
scripts.test:bdd:agent-live:assignments: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-assignments
scripts.test:bdd:agent-live:references: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-references
scripts.test:bdd:agent-live:curation: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-curation
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@live-agent
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:core: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-core
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:assignments: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-assignments
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:references: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-references
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:curation: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-curation
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:hello: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-core --name "The console agent responds to hello"
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:docs: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-core --name "The console agent discovers resource documentation progressively"
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:create: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-assignments --name "The console agent creates a research Assignment"
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:get: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-assignments --name "The console agent can fetch Assignment info"
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:update: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-assignments --name "The console agent can update Assignment status"
scripts.test:bdd:agent-local:error-shape: npm run -s check:reference-action-contract && PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_BDD=1 PAPYRUS_LIVE_AGENT_LOCAL_RESPONDER=1 poetry run behave features_backend --tags=@agent-assignments --name "The console agent returns structured error shape for invalid Assignment input"
